headline: Shares of oil and gas companies are trading lower. The commodity may be falling in reaction to peace negotiations between Russia and Ukraine.
summary: Shares of oil and gas companies are trading lower. The commodity may be falling in reaction to peace negotiations between Russia and Ukraine.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on Equity Residential, Raises Price Target to $70
summary: Mizuho  analyst Vikram Malhorta   maintains Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $66 to $70.
